reasoning: DeepSeek is a highly capable Chinese AI lab, but it operates under significant compute constraints relative to western incumbents due to US hardware export controls. By December 31, 2025, they will be competing against the next-generation frontier models from OpenAI (GPT-5 or equivalent), Anthropic (Claude 4), and Google (Gemini 2/Ultra). While DeepSeek may produce highly efficient and competitive open-source models, holding the absolute #1 spot on the Chatbot Arena text leaderboard at a specific snapshot requires outpacing the massive R&D investments of trillion-dollar tech giants. Historically, minor competitors and open-weights challengers are priced on Polymarket in the 1-4% range for maintaining the top tier at year's end against new proprietary releases. Without concrete evidence of an architectural breakthrough that bypasses compute limits, the base rate of them being #1 over OpenAI/Anthropic is extremely low.
